content.body: Hi! I think it would be useful to have a topic for the Sanitizer. We plan on moving some of the issues from the WICG repo to HTML.
Tom Schuster: you should now have that power.
content.formatted_body: Tom Schuster: you should now have that power.

content.body:
I vibe'd https://zcorpan.github.io/whatwg-contrib-report/

LMK if something seems incorrect
zcorpan: it seems like it does not account for affiliation changes, which skews the numbers toward current employers significantly.
content.formatted_body: zcorpan: it seems like it does not account for affiliation changes, which skews the numbers toward current employers significantly.

content.body: annevk: Yes. There's a disclaimer about that at the top. I couldn't think of a way to track that with available data
content.formatted_body: annevk: Yes. There's a disclaimer about that at the top. I couldn't think of a way to track that with available data

content.body: That note doesn't reflect the situation for Hixie (who left Google afaik).
Hmm hixie has no Entity affiliations in the later tables. Might be a bug
Also funny that Hixie is still #1 after being away for a decade plus.
No it's correct, the spec overview doesn't say hixie is associated with Google, just that Google is the top entity
Yeah :) The switch to PRs makes the commit count have different weight... Some PRs have 100+ commits before squashing
Indeed, the process has changed completely. I was kidding in case that was unclear. I would love the addition of reviewer analysis.
